reference: Back pain is most probably due to back muscle weakness. If the magnetic resonance imaging is normal, that means there is no nerve compression. I would suggest starting her on calcium and vitamin B12 therapy. She should also take a muscle relaxant and apply diclofenac ointment. Additionally, warm water on her back during showers will also help.
